personas.name: Frustrated Seeker
personas.description: A mental wellbeing app user who values ease of use and straightforward support
context: Seeking mental health support during a crisis
Having limited time to devote to mental health

personas.name: Emma
personas.description: Seeking emotional support and guidance for inner conflicts
goals: Find effective solutions to manage emotional struggles
Improve mental wellbeing through reliable support tools
Learn healthy coping mechanisms for inner conflicts
pain_points: Struggling to find trustworthy resources for mental health
context: Actively seeking mental health resources and tools
Open to trying digital solutions for emotional support
Values convenience and accessibility in mental health support
constraints: Limited time to dedicate to mental health support
Prefers discreet and private support options

personas.name: Frugal MindSeeker
personas.description: A mental wellbeing app user who is price-sensitive and seeks affordable support
goals: To access affordable mental wellbeing resources
pain_points: High subscription costs for mental wellbeing apps
Limited free or low-cost options for mental health support
context: Active in the mental health and wellbeing space
Familiar with various mental wellbeing apps and services
Seeking a cost-effective solution for mental health support
constraints: Limited budget for mental health expenses

personas.name: Frustrated User
personas.description: A person who struggles with using mental wellbeing apps due to functionality issues
goals: To easily use a mental wellbeing app
To achieve a sense of calm and relaxation
To track progress and set goals
pain_points: Frustrating user experience due to slow performance
Inability to effectively use the app's techniques
context: Seeking mental wellbeing support through mobile apps
Values ease of use and accessibility
constraints: Limited time to devote to learning a new app
May have technical issues with their device

personas.name: Anxious Seeker
personas.description: Individual struggling with anxiety and stress seeking effective relief
goals: Find a reliable source of emotional support
pain_points: Feeling overwhelmed by anxiety and stress
Lack of human connection and understanding
context: Possibly dealing with other mental health conditions
constraints: Limited time or resources for in-person therapy
Difficulty opening up to others about mental health
